scientific_question: Do guilds aggregate near spawn through time?
design_terms: event-time spline × distance ring; effort; calendar; event/location/observer RE
supports_hypothesis_if: positive active/egg count effect and plausible timing/distance decay

scientific_question: Which species drive guild responses?
design_terms: species-specific event-time and distance; effort; observer/location/event
supports_hypothesis_if: positive count and/or encounter effect with coherent trajectory

scientific_question: Does the total number of associated birds increase?
design_terms: Tweedie/NB response; event-time × distance; effort and observation effects
supports_hypothesis_if: higher expected total count near active/egg window

scientific_question: Does assemblage richness increase?
design_terms: binomial/COM-Poisson richness; event-time × distance

scientific_question: At what radius is the response strongest?
supports_hypothesis_if: ordered positive effects near spawn that attenuate with distance

scientific_question: What is the continuous spatiotemporal response surface?
design_terms: restricted tensor smooth of days and footprint distance
supports_hypothesis_if: positive supported surface centered on event

scientific_question: Do birds move from comparison zones toward spawn zones?
design_terms: multinomial/Dirichlet-multinomial allocation conditional on regional total
supports_hypothesis_if: higher active-period share in near-spawn zones and lower far-zone share

scientific_question: Is local increase redistribution or regional influx?
design_terms: joint near, far, total trajectories with effort offsets/covariates
supports_hypothesis_if: near rises; far falls implies redistribution; regional total rise implies influx
main_limitations: regional coverage and changing checklist effort

scientific_question: Does the same eBird locality change in spawn vs nonspawn years/dates?
design_terms: location FE + year/date FE + local event exposure
main_limitations: temporary treatment and uneven repeated coverage

scientific_question: Does a repeated observer record more birds at spawn-exposed sites?
design_terms: conditional logistic/count model within observer and calendar strata

scientific_question: Does probability of any report change?
design_terms: binomial GAMM with observation-process terms
main_limitations: can miss aggregation if prevalence already high

scientific_question: Does flock size increase when present?
design_terms: Gaussian/lognormal mixed model

scientific_question: Can one distribution capture occurrence and flock size?
design_terms: NB, ZINB, or Tweedie compared by diagnostics

scientific_question: Are large flocks more likely near spawn?
design_terms: cumulative-link mixed model

scientific_question: Does source-record fragmentation dilute effects?
design_terms: compare source rows with 1km/3d,2km/7d,5km/14d complexes

scientific_question: Does point geometry misclassify long spawns?
design_terms: point distance vs shoreline anchor vs length/width uncertainty footprint
supports_hypothesis_if: response aligns better with footprint-adjusted distance

scientific_question: How does exposure to all concurrent events combine?
design_terms: sum of distance-decayed, time-weighted event exposures

scientific_question: Do stronger spawn records generate larger responses?
design_terms: event-time effect × standardized relative index

scientific_question: Can survey components/method be combined without treating missing as zero?
design_terms: component-specific effects or latent intensity with method and component count

scientific_question: Do mechanisms explain species heterogeneity?
design_terms: meta-regression on guild, foraging mode, mobility, marine dependence
supports_hypothesis_if: positive mean and stronger roe-feeder effects

scientific_question: Does community composition reorganize?
design_terms: latent factors plus species-specific event effects and nuisance terms

scientific_question: Is multivariate composition associated with spawn exposure?
design_terms: partial dbRDA/PERMANOVA with event/calendar strata
supports_hypothesis_if: significant composition shift with interpretable taxa loadings

scientific_question: Do birds track latitudinal spawn progression?
design_terms: latitude × event date × exposure; region random slopes
supports_hypothesis_if: bird peak follows local spawn rather than fixed calendar only

scientific_question: Do active locations change more than simultaneous comparison locations?
design_terms: event stack FE; location and calendar controls; non-overlapping periods
supports_hypothesis_if: positive active-area interaction and negative/flat comparison change
main_limitations: no recorded spawn is not verified absence

scientific_question: Can well-observed spawn sites be compared with weighted donor sites?
design_terms: interactive fixed effects / matrix completion
main_limitations: few high-quality sites and donor contamination

scientific_question: Does sampling shift toward active spawn?
design_terms: checklist/observer allocation model; event-cluster bootstrap
supports_hypothesis_if: used to qualify, not prove, bird response

scientific_question: Are similar effects found at false dates?
design_terms: ±14, ±28, random-year shifts

scientific_question: Are effects specific to spawn locations?
design_terms: shoreline-shifted pseudo-events with matched accessibility

scientific_question: Does the site show the pattern in years without recorded spawn?
design_terms: location × calendar matched years
supports_hypothesis_if: effect present in spawn years but not nonspawn years

scientific_question: Are results consistent across stock regions?
design_terms: region-specific models plus random-effects synthesis

scientific_question: Do frozen models predict future events/years?
design_terms: fit through 2025; evaluate later DFO/eBird releases
supports_hypothesis_if: predeclared positive effects in new data

scientific_question: Is count availability exposure-dependent?
design_terms: binomial mixed model for numeric-count availability
supports_hypothesis_if: no strong differential missingness; otherwise sensitivity required
main_limitations: X may correlate with flock size

scientific_question: Do guild results survive taxonomic ambiguity?
design_terms: fit named-only, lower-bound, and inclusive-upper-bound outcomes
main_limitations: ambiguous reports may overlap named birds
